title: Import line items from a file
description: Download the template, fill it in, then upload. Valid rows are added to the form.

template.title: Step 1 — Download template
template.hint: Use the provided template so columns and formats match the system.
template.downloadError: Could not download the template, please try again.

upload.title: Step 2 — Upload file
upload.mergeHint: Valid rows are added to the form; error rows are skipped. You still need to click Create.

review.noneValid: No valid rows. Please fix the file and re-upload.
review.willImport: {{count}} valid rows will be added to the form.

errors.parseFailed: Could not read the file, please try again.

code.IMPORT_TAX_RATE_RANGE: Tax rate must be between 0 and 100
